dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates an explicit 'rules-context-loader' step prior to pattern generation. Successful schema validation across both spans indicates strict adherence to defined governance protocols and data structures.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The transition from 'approved-adr' to 'pattern' suggests a logical progression from decision-making to implementation design. The high completion token count (over 9,000 total) implies a detailed mapping of architectural intent to structural patterns.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The 'approved-adr-to-pattern' step inherently involves resolving trade-offs identified in the ADR. While specific trade-off text isn't visible in the metadata, the successful schema-validated output of a pattern from an ADR indicates successful resolution of architectural constraints.
